meta.listDescription: Browse supportive self-assessments to better understand your current needs.
meta.detailDescription: Take {title} through a calm guided web flow.
meta.resultDescription: View your saved assessment result with a calm, non-diagnostic summary.

home.title: Calm self-assessments that help you understand what to do next
home.note: These assessments are designed to support reflection and care entry. They do not replace professional evaluation or diagnosis.
home.trustNote: Your result is meant to guide your next step gently. It should not be treated as a diagnosis on its own.

heroStats.assessmentsHint: Tools you can start right now

home.availableNote: Choose an assessment that matches what you want to understand right now.
home.nextNote: If this assessment helped you reflect and you want gentle direction, continue to matching. Use support only for booking, payment, account, or technical issues.
home.nextMatchingNote: Use matching when you want help narrowing down the right practitioner after reflection.
home.nextSupportNote: Use support only for booking, payment, account, or technical issues around your journey.

card.noDescription: A short supportive assessment to help you reflect on your current needs.

empty.heading: No assessments are available right now
empty.note: When new assessments are published, they will appear here.

history.heading: Your recent results
history.note: A simple history of completed assessments so you can return to them when helpful.

empty.heading: Your completed assessments will appear here
empty.note: Once you complete an assessment, you will be able to revisit its result from this space.

detail.note: Take a few moments to answer honestly. There is no need to overthink each answer.
detail.trustNote: Your answers are submitted only when you finish. This web flow does not save partial progress yet.

beforeYouBegin.heading: Before you begin
beforeYouBegin.first: Try to answer based on how things feel for you right now, not on the ideal answer.
beforeYouBegin.second: The result is a supportive summary, not a diagnosis or medical conclusion.
beforeYouBegin.third: If you want more personal guidance after the result, you can continue to guided matching or browse practitioners.

flow.requiredError: Please choose one answer before moving on.
flow.footerNote: You can move back and forth before submitting, but partial progress is not saved yet.

result.note: This is a supportive summary of your completed assessment to help you choose a practical next step.
result.nonDiagnosticNote: This result is not a diagnosis. If you need personal guidance, speaking with a qualified mental health professional is the most reliable next step.

actions.moreAssessmentsNote: Review another assessment if you want more self-reflection before deciding.
actions.guidedMatchingNote: Answer a few short questions to get practitioner suggestions that fit your current needs.
actions.browsePractitionersNote: Explore practitioners directly if you are ready to book.

unavailable.heading: This result view is not available yet
unavailable.note: The selected submission does not have a complete result that can be shown on the web.

catalogError.heading: We could not load the assessments right now
catalogError.note: Please try again shortly. Your patient area is still available.

historyError.heading: We could not load your recent assessment history
historyError.note: You can still browse available assessments and try again later.

resultError.heading: We could not load this assessment result
resultError.note: Please try again. If the problem continues, return to the assessments page.

unsupported.heading: This assessment is not ready for the web flow yet
unsupported.note: The current web experience supports the stable single-choice assessment format only.

states.submitError: We could not submit your answers right now. Please try again.
